title: hebe subalpina
intro: Hebe subalpina, also known as Alpine Hebe, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Hebe subalpina include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Hebe subalpina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
